home.title: Daily AI tools in one place
home.subtitle: AI-powered online utilities in one place

favorites.emptyBody: Tap the heart on a card to add favorites.

consent.title: Privacy Notice
consent.message: This site uses cookies for analytics and advertising.

hairstyle-recommendation.name: Hairstyle Recommendation
hairstyle-recommendation.title: Hairstyle Recommendation
hairstyle-recommendation.description: Get AI-recommended hairstyles tailored to your face shape

entry.manualSub: No photo needed — choose from illustrations

upload.dropzone: Drag a photo here or tap to choose
upload.hint: PNG, JPG, WebP · up to 5 MB
upload.privacy: Your photo is analyzed once and never stored
upload.errorType: Unsupported image type. Use PNG, JPG, or WebP.
upload.errorSize: Image is too large. Use a file under 5 MB.

analysis.lowConfidence: Not fully sure? You can pick your face shape manually

error.validation: Something looks off with the request. Please try again.
error.tooLarge: That photo is too large (max 5 MB). Try a smaller image.
error.invalidImage: Unsupported image. Use PNG, JPG, or WebP.
error.noFace: We couldn't detect a face — try a clearer, front-facing photo, or pick your face shape manually.
error.rateLimited: You're going a bit fast — please wait a moment.
error.aiUnavailable: Our style advisor is briefly unavailable. Please try again.
error.offline: You appear to be offline — check your connection and try again.
error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

intro.heading: Discover hairstyles that suit you with AI
intro.body: Upload your photo or select your face shape, then refine a few preferences like style, length, hair type, and occasion. Our AI will recommend the best hairstyles for your face shape, complete with styling tips and reference images.

workspace.photoEmptyHint: Your photo stays visible here after upload
workspace.readyHint: Pick your options and press Get recommendations — results appear here

howto.title: How it works
howto.step1: Upload a photo or choose your face shape
howto.step2: Select your style preference, length, hair type, and occasion
howto.step3: Get hairstyle recommendations tailored to your face shape

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: No. Your photo is analyzed once and then immediately deleted. It's never stored or logged.
faq.a2: We support 7 face shapes: oval, round, square, heart, oblong, diamond, and triangle. Each has hairstyles that work best for it.
faq.a3: Yes. Use the Regenerate button to get fresh recommendations with the same settings.

footer.contact: Questions or feedback? Reach out to hello@jurepi.kr
